name: Roller Coaster - Epic Bat Shooting Game

reviews.review_description: Doesn't shoot or do anything else waste of money

developer_response.body:
Hello, margie.peddie, we are really sorry for the issues which you mentioned and we appreciate your patience. 

But now we've fixed the shooting issue and you can control the speed as well.
 
We'll be happy if you get back to the game and you'll enjoy the ride & shooting for sure.

Thanks again for your feedback!

reviews.review_description: You can't actually shoot the bats, the shots just go straight through them and they don't react! It does nothing. The two coasters are the same, one is just faster and just as dull. Plus I bought the extra track and it never unlocked, clicking the option just asks me to pay and unlock it again (maybe that's where the shooting is?). Avoid.

developer_response.body:
Hello RaMarcus, we are really sorry for the issues which you mentioned and we appreciate your patience. 

But now we've fixed the shooting issue as well and now you can also play the locked mode. 
We'll be happy if you get back to the game and you'll enjoy the ride & shooting for sure.

Thanks again for your feedback!

reviews.review_description: I always liked this app but now it's 9 when before I'd have given it a 6 of 10__ The heavens look so real =GREAT JOB!

For starters, there's not three modes available. The bat shooting mode is locked and needs to be bought in-game. So there's only two modes. Apparently one of these modes is supposed to have speed control, but there are no instructions whatsoever and nothing I do with the controller seems to affect the speed in any way.  I've tried everything, so the control system is either badly broken or has severe design flaws.  It's also a pretty short ride. This is certainly not "the most refined, immersive and energetic" coaster out there. Far, far from it. This is clearly an unfinished product.

I would have been prepared to give it a 2 star rating, because it looks halfway decent, but I don't like being lied to. Having to buy the actual shooting mode in-game is deceitful. So I'm giving it 1 star.

developer_response.body:
Hello, fredrik.back, we are really sorry for the issues which you mentioned and we appreciate your patience. 

But now we've fixed the shooting issue and you can control the speed as well. We've also unlocked all modes and now you can play without any in-app purchase.
 
We'll be happy if you get back to the game and you'll enjoy the ride & shooting for sure.

We are looking forward to your mode feedback to improve the game for our valuable users!
Thanks again for your patience!

reviews.review_description: I was really excited to play this and the shooting part does not work..bats still flying around like I was shooting "blanks".  Can I please get a refund,  this should be for free..  Not happy 😒

developer_response.body:
Hello, vrhopie, we are so sad to see your feedback! We also appreciate your patience but now we have good news for you. 

We're writing to let you know that we've fixed the shooting issue and you can control the speed as well. We've also unlocked all modes and now you can play without any in-app purchase.
 
We'll be happy if you get back to the game and you'll enjoy the ride & shooting for sure.

reviews.review_description: This game is waste of money don't bother.

developer_response.body:
Hello, Arfianiqbal123, can you please tell us in detail about the issue which you faced in the game? We always work on users' feedback and would love to know about your feedback.

We are still working on this game and we'll keep improving the gameplay. Stay tuned with us!

Thanks again for your patience!
